mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchase_plan (plan_id, plan_year, plan_month, plan_seq, material_id, material_name, spec_model, demand_qty, plan_date, applicant, approval_status, remark) VALUES (#{planId}, #{planYear}, #{planMonth}, #{planSeq}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{specModel}, #{demandQty}, #{planDate}, #{applicant}, '0', #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE purchase_plan SET approval_status = #{status}, approver = #{approver}, approval_time = NOW() WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(plan_seq) FROM purchase_plan WHERE plan_year = #{year} AND plan_month = #{month}
SELECT * FROM purchase_plan WHERE approval_status = #{status} ORDER BY plan_date DESC
